channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: California to consider requiring mental health warnings on social media sites
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — California, home to some of the largest technology companies in the world, would be the first U.S. state to require mental health warning labels on social media sites if lawmakers pass a bill introduced Monday.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Amazon seals Mountain View deal as South Bay office sector perks up
item.description: Amazon has struck a deal to rent a big office building in Mountain View in a hopeful sign of an office market rebound.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: Reddit rolls out AI search feature
item.description: Reddit has launched a new AI search feature for its site. The test rollout of Reddit Answers, launched Monday, will allow users to have their questions answered through a new conversational interface.
item.dc:creator: Joanne Haner, The Hill

item.title: Supply chain compromise of Ultralytics AI library results in trojanized versions
item.description: Attackers have compromised Ultralytics YOLO packages published on PyPI, the official Python package index, by compromising the build environment of the popular library for creating custom machine learning models.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: The Threat of AI-Powered Cyberattacks and Spyware
item.description: AI-powered cyberattacks, spyware, cybersecurity, identity theft, financial fraud.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: IAEA chief: Iran is poised to 'quite dramatically' increase stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium
item.description: MANAMA, Bahrain (AP) — Iran is poised to “quite dramatically” increase its stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium as it has started cascades of advanced centrifuges, the head of the International Atomic Energy Agency warned Friday.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Clarifai previews AI compute orchestration
item.description: AI platform provider Clarifai is publicly previewing compute orchestration for AI workloads that the company says works across any AI model on any compute, at any scale.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Two senators look to reign in big tech’s influence in defense AI, cloud contracts
item.description: The bill would require DoD to use a competitive award process when contracting with cloud, advanced AI systems or data infrastructure vendors. The post Two senators look to reign in big tech’s influence in defense AI, cloud contracts first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: Appeals court upholds TikTok ban law
item.description: A federal appeals court on Friday upheld a law requiring TikTok’s Chinese parent company to sell the popular app or face a U.S. ban. A three-judge panel with the U.S. Court of Appeals for the D.C. Circuit found that the law does not violate the First Amendment, as TikTok has argued.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: China's ban on key high-tech materials could have broad impact on industries, economy
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China has banned exports of key materials used to make a wide range of products, including smartphones, electric vehicles, radar systems and CT scanners, swiping back at Washington after it expanded export controls to include dozens of Chinese companies that make equipment used to pro
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: JDK 24: The new features in Java 24
item.description: Java Development Kit (JDK) 24 is now in an initial rampdown phase, with the feature set frozen at 24 features, ranging from a class-file API to a fourth preview of structured concurrency. JDK 24 reached the rampdown phase on December 5. It is due as a production release on March 18, 2025.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: OpenAI unveils API for tracking OpenAI API usage, costs
item.description: OpenAI has introduced the Usage API, an API that allows enterprises to track their activity across the OpenAI API. With the Usage API, OpenAI API usage and costs can be assessed programmatically, the company said.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: TMF award to help OPM modernize COBOL code via AI
item.description: Guy Cavallo, the OPM CIO, said by using artificial intelligence to rewrite software code, the agency will need fewer programmers without losing oversight rigor. The post TMF award to help OPM modernize COBOL code via AI first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Chinese online retailer Temu suspended in Vietnam
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam has suspended the operations of Chinese online retailer Temu after it failed to meet a government deadline to register the company by the end of November.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: White House says at least 8 US telecom firms, dozens of nations impacted by China hacking campaign
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A top White House official on Wednesday said at least eight U.S. telecom firms and dozens of nations have been impacted by a Chinese hacking campaign.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: District of Columbia says Amazon secretly stopped fast deliveries to 2 predominantly Black ZIP codes
item.description: The District of Columbia sued Amazon on Wednesday, alleging the company secretly stopped providing its fastest delivery service to residents of two predominantly Black neighborhoods while still charging millions of dollars for a membership that promises the benefit.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: If you had a Patreon account, you may qualify for this payment
item.description: Patreon will pay $7.25 million across users who had accounts and accessed videos on Patreon.com between April 1, 2016 and Sept. 23, 2024.
item.dc:creator: Katie Millard, NewsNation

item.title: Global Network Outage Trends: Insights from ThousandEyes Reports
item.description: Discover the latest trends in global network outage events, ISP outages, cloud provider network outages, and collaboration app network outages, as reported by ThousandEyes.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: TikTok defends handling of Romania election content in grilling by EU lawmakers
item.description: BUCHAREST, Romania (AP) — TikTok took down several networks that tried to meddle in Romania's elections, executives said Tuesday as they defended the company's election integrity measures to European Union lawmakers.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN and STEPHEN McGRATH, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: AT&T sees earnings growth over next 3 years; eyes more than $40B in anticipated shareholder returns
item.description: AT&T anticipates earnings growth over the next three years thanks to the momentum of 5G and fiber services.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: China bans exports to US of gallium, germanium, antimony in response to chip sanctions
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China announced Tuesday it is banning exports to the United States of gallium, germanium, antimony and other key high-tech materials with potential military applications, as a general principle, lashing back at U.S. limits on semiconductor-related exports.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, NewsNation
